summary: The concept brief contains a critical readiness claim (Evidence D) that contradicts the synthetic support and violates the review boundary by implying launch readiness without approval.

findings.title: Readiness claim exceeds synthetic support
findings.summary: Evidence D asserts immediate launch readiness, which contradicts the provided synthetic support and violates the boundary against inferring execution readiness.

findings.title: Missing caveats on synthetic evidence
findings.summary: Evidence A and B lack explicit caveats regarding the non-representative nature of the synthetic interview notes and concept sketches.

findings.title: Generic evidence labels need traceability
findings.summary: Evidence labels are generic but should ensure traceability without exposing private notes or project-specific identifiers.
